results.name: Cold Start - Dashboard Loads
results.expected: Dashboard page loads without errors at /admin/dashboard
results.details: Status: 200, Title: Admin Dashboard

results.name: Sidebar Navigation
results.expected: Sidebar visible with navigation items: Dashboard, Groups, Messages, Runs, Agent Testing, Settings
results.details: Found 6 nav items: Dashboard, 群管理, 消息记录, 运行日志, Agent测试New, 系统设置

results.name: Sidebar Collapse/Expand
results.expected: Clicking sidebar rail collapses and expands the sidebar
results.details: Initial: 240px, Collapsed: 50px, Expanded: 240px

results.name: Dashboard Page Content
results.expected: Dashboard shows stats cards, activity section, quick actions
results.details: Cards found: 17, Has title: true, Has grid: true, Activity: true, Quick actions: true

results.name: Navigate to Groups Page
results.expected: Clicking Groups in sidebar navigates to /admin/groups, shows DataTable with filters
results.details: URL: http://localhost:3000/admin/groups, Table: true, Headers: 6, Filter: true

results.name: Groups Search and Filter
results.expected: Search input and status filter dropdown available on Groups page
results.details: Search input: true, Status filter: true

results.name: Groups Search and Filter
results.expected: Search input and status filter available
results.details: Error: searchInput.clear is not a function

results.name: Groups Configure Drawer
results.expected: Clicking Configure opens a drawer/dialog for group configuration
results.details: Drawer opened: true

results.name: Messages Page
results.expected: Messages page shows filters (search, group, type) and message display area
results.details: Search: true, Group filter: true, Type filter: true, Message area: true

results.name: Runs Page
results.expected: Runs page shows DataTable with status filter and log viewer access
results.details: Table: true, Headers: 6, Status filter: true

results.name: Runs Log Viewer
results.expected: Clicking View Logs opens a drawer with terminal-style log display
results.details: Log viewer opened: true, Terminal style: true

results.name: Settings Page
results.expected: Settings page shows Feishu config, AI config, System preferences sections with save button
results.details: Inputs: 6, Switches: 2, Save: true, Feishu: true, AI: true, System: true

results.name: Agent Testing Page
results.expected: Agent Testing page shows task trigger panel (group, skill, intent) and log stream
results.details: Group selector: true, Skill: true, Intent: true, Trigger: true, Log stream: true

results.name: Breadcrumb Navigation
results.expected: Breadcrumb shows current page path (Admin > Agent Testing)
results.details: Breadcrumb items: 3

results.name: Header Component
results.expected: Header shows sidebar trigger, search, notification bell, user avatar
results.details: Sidebar trigger: true, Search: true, Bell: true, Avatar: true

results.name: Responsive Layout (Mobile)
results.expected: On mobile viewport, sidebar collapses and content is accessible
results.details: Sidebar hidden on mobile: true

results.name: Quick Actions
results.expected: Dashboard quick action buttons navigate to correct pages
results.details: Quick action links found: 6

results.name: Root Redirect
results.expected: /admin redirects to /admin/dashboard
results.details: Final URL: http://localhost:3000/admin/dashboard

results.name: Group Config Standalone Page
results.expected: /admin/group-config page loads with group configuration form
results.details: Has content: true, Body length: 319

results.name: API Error Handling
results.expected: Pages handle API errors gracefully with error messages or empty states
results.details: Error visible: false, Data/empty state: true

results.name: 404 Page
results.expected: Non-existent routes show 404 page
results.details: 404 content found: true

results.name: CSS Styles Applied
results.expected: Tailwind CSS utilities are applied correctly (backgrounds, fonts, spacing)
results.details: Body bg: oklch(1 0 0), Sidebar bg: rgb(250, 250, 249), Font: Inter, "PingFang SC", "Microsoft YaHei", sans-serif

results.name: DataTable Sorting
results.expected: Clicking sortable column header sorts the table
results.details: Sortable header clicked and responded
